name: @rivetos/rivet-android
description: RivetHub for Android — native Kotlin client + on-device RivetOS node. Built with Gradle, not npm; this manifest exists only to register the project in the nx graph (DDD tags + boundaries). No JS dependencies. Real work runs under gradle-wrapping targets (apk/check/verify) deliberately NOT named build/test/lint, so CI's SDK-less nx sweeps skip it — same 'builds live where an SDK lives' posture as the Tauri desktop shell.
